message:
feat(frame): implement DataFrame loc/iloc label-based and position-based row selection

Extends DataFrame with pandas-compatible indexing methods:

- loc(): label-based row selection for list-like indexers matching df.loc[[...]].
  Returns rows in selector order, preserves duplicate labels, and fails closed
  on missing labels with FrameError::CompatibilityRejected
- iloc(): position-based row selection for list-like indexers matching df.iloc[[...]].
  Returns rows in selector order, preserves duplicates, and bounds-checks
  all positions

Includes 4 new tests:
- loc selects labels in request order with duplicates
- loc rejects missing labels
- iloc selects positions in request order with duplicates
- iloc rejects out-of-bounds positions

This complements the earlier Series loc/iloc implementation (f8fa14e) to provide
full DataFrame-level label/position indexing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
